chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.S-325 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Appl. in D/o case 1. For orders on CMA No.103/2026 (U/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.102/2025 (Restoration) 02.02.2026 Mr. Azeem Khan Kamboh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ************** 1. Granted. 2. Heard counsel for the petitioner on the listed CMA No.102/2025. It is contended that no notice for hearing on 15.12.2025 was issued to him, and the instant Constitution Petition was dismissed on account of non-prosecution. The contention raised requires consideration. Accordingly, the listed CMA is allowed, and the instant Constitution Petition is restored to its original position. Heard counsel for the petitioner, learned Assistant A.G., and perused the material available on record. From the perusal of the record, it transpires that the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of the Peace, Kandiaro, vide order dated 12.08.2024 passed in Crl. Misc. Application No.2963/2024, directed the concerned SHO to provide legal protection to the petitioner (Annexure D-I). Since the said order dated 12.08.2024 is still in the field, the instant constitutional petition does not lie and is not maintainable. Accordingly, the present constitutional petition is premature and not maintainable; therefore, it stands dismissed. J U D G E M. Ali*
